originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&driver_data` is never used.

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Line 39: `driver_data = &some_int` inside ptmx_open() (compiled when UNIX98=T). In the non-goto path, driver_data is assigned at L39 then function returns at L41 — dead store. No '// ERROR' at L39, so this is a new bug not in VBDB. DEVPTS only controls pts_sb_from_inode() (L8); it has no effect on the dead store at L39. The dead store occurs for any config with UNIX98=T, regardless of DEVPTS. PC adds DEVPTS=F unnecessarily, making it over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
